queries.question: Tell me the specializations of all photographers and videographers who charge 500.
queries.sql:
SELECT Visual_Art_Profession.Specialization 
FROM Visual_Art_Profession
WHERE (Visual_Art_Profession.Profession = "Photographer" OR Visual_Art_Profession.Profession = "Videographer") AND Visual_Art_Profession.Price = 500.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?specialization WHERE {
  ?visual_art_profession a :Visual_Art_Profession .
  ?visual_art_profession p:Specialization ?specialization .
  ?visual_art_profession p:Profession ?profession_w .
  ?visual_art_profession p:Profession ?profession_w2 .
  ?visual_art_profession p:Price ?price_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?profession_w) = "Photographer" || STR(?profession_w2) = "Videographer")) && (STR(?price_w) = "500" || STR(?price_w) = "500.0")))
}
